productDisplayName: Arrow Men Auto Press Grey Shirt
description: Style NoteThe addition of refined details in this formal staple elevates this cotton shirt from the brand's Autopress line, above the ordinary.Incorporating this season's hottest trends from the runway into your wardrobe, this shirt tops our officewear wish list (did we mention itswrinkle-free?) Style it with dark chinos and understated, tonal accessories.Product DetailsGrey shirt, has a spread collar, a buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, a pleat at the back chest and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash coldDry inside outSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size 40
